primary_function: A set of resources to help me write all kinds of internal communications, using the formats that my company likes to use. Claude should use this skill whenever asked to write some sort of internal communications (status reports, leadership updates, 3P updates, company newsletters, FAQs, incident reports, project updates, etc.).
suggested_aec_gates: Verify communication type matches one of the supported formats (3P updates, newsletters, FAQs, status reports, leadership updates, project updates, incident reports)
Confirm output follows the appropriate guideline template from examples directory
Ensure tone is appropriate for internal corporate communication
Validate that Progress/Plans/Problems structure is used for 3P updates
Verify FAQ responses directly address the questions asked
Confirm status reports include clear progress indicators
Ensure incident reports contain factual, non-speculative information
Validate that communication stays within internal company scope
trigger_text: A set of resources to help me write all kinds of internal communications, using the formats that my company likes to use. Claude should use this skill whenever asked to write some sort of internal communications (status reports, leadership updates, 3P updates, company newsletters, FAQs, incident reports, project updates, etc.).
